rulings.Case Title: TERILYN JOE et al VS. 1520 TAYLOR STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Resolving Settlement Dispute
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday January 21, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT 1520 TAYLOR STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's Motion For Order Resolving Settlement Dispute HEARING REQUIRED. Moving party to prepare a draft of the Settlement Agreement containing all the terms of the November 11, 2014 Agreement, plus insert standard CC 1542 waiver into section 3 of the Agreement. No more changes should be included. =(501/req)
